final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty skincare brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a three-column hero layout (left: copy column, center: model subject, right: product display column) plus a header bar above and a bottom benefit strip below
Subject: must include all of the following:
  Center: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle
  Right column: moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box, 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents
  Left column: headline, subheadline, 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons, 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks, 2 CTA buttons, trust badge line
  Header: logo wordmark, 5 navigation links, 1 CTA button
  Bottom: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy beauty-brand landing page environment — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, diffused lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant, with purple floral accents
Materials/textures: needs a light, delicate surface treatment — exact texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all of the following verbatim:
  Header — logo: "LUMEA BEAUTY"
  Header — nav links (5): "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ"
  Header — CTA button: "今すぐ試す"
  Hero left — headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
  Hero left — subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
  Hero left — feature badges (3 pill-shaped): "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"
  Hero left — bullet points (3, pink checkmarks): "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"
  Hero left — CTA buttons (2): "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >"
  Hero left — trust badges: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Hero right — stat cards (3 floating): "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"
  Bottom — benefit cards (3): "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve full three-column hero structure; header and bottom benefit strip must be clearly distinct sections; all text items above must appear verbatim in their designated zones
Avoid:
